tagline: WeKnora is an LLM-powered framework designed for deep document understanding and semantic retrieval, especially for handling complex, heterogeneous documents.
description:
WeKnora is a deep document understanding and semantic retrieval framework based on Large Language Models (LLM), specifically designed for document scenarios with complex structures and heterogeneous content. It adopts a modular architecture, integrating key technologies such as multimodal preprocessing, semantic vector indexing, intelligent retrieval, and large model inference. Based on the Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) paradigm, it achieves context-aware, high-quality Q&A capabilities. WeKnora can deeply understand document content in different formats, combine relevant document fragments with language model inference, and output accurate, coherent semantic results.

**Key Features:**
- Multimodal Deep Parsing: Supports structured content extraction from various formats such as PDF, Word, TXT, images, including OCR image text recognition.
- Semantic Vector Indexing and Intelligent Retrieval: Achieves high-precision semantic matching and recall through a combination of vector retrieval, keyword retrieval, and even knowledge graph-enhanced retrieval.
- RAG Closed-Loop Q&A Generation: Generates accurate and coherent content answers by leveraging large language model inference and retrieval fragment fusion.
- Agent Mode Enhanced Capabilities: Supports ReACT Agent mode, which can call built-in tools, external web search, etc., during multi-round iterations, to improve complex task processing capabilities.
- Multi-type Knowledge Base Management: Can create FAQ and document-type knowledge bases, and flexibly manage tags, batch import files or URLs.
- Configurable Dialogue Strategy and UI: Provides an intuitive Web interface and REST API, allowing online adjustment of models, retrieval thresholds, and Prompt to control dialogue behavior.

**Learn More:**
- [Official Website](https://weknora.weixin.qq.com)
- [GitHub Link](https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora)
author: tencent

releaseNotes.en_US:
- v0.2.14 prioritizes environment variables over Git tags for version detection.
- Completion URL host extraction now handles both v1 and non-v1 endpoints.
- Parser chunk index logging was fixed, Ollama retest icon alignment was improved, and pg_search migration files were added.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- v0.2.14 prioritizes environment variables over Git tags for version detection.
- Completion URL host extraction now handles both v1 and non-v1 endpoints.
- Parser chunk index logging was fixed, Ollama retest icon alignment was improved, and pg_search migration files were added.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- v0.2.14 dà priorità alle variabili di ambiente rispetto ai tag Git per il rilevamento della versione.
- Il completamento dell'estrazione host URL ora gestisce sia gli endpoint v1 che non-v1.
- La registrazione dell'indice dei blocchi del parser è stata corretta, l'allineamento delle icone di nuovo test di Ollama è stato migliorato e sono stati aggiunti i file di migrazione pg_search.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- v0.2.14 prioriterer miljøvariabler over Git-tagger for versjonsdeteksjon.
- Fullføring URL vertsekstraksjon håndterer nå både v1 og non-v1 endepunkter.
- Parser chunk index logging ble fikset, Ollama retest ikonjustering ble forbedret, og pg_search migrasjonsfiler ble lagt til.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- v0.2.14 在 version detection 中优先使用 environment variables，而不是 Git tags。
- Completion URL host extraction 现在同时处理 v1 和 non-v1 endpoints。
- 修复了 parser chunk index logging，改进了 Ollama retest icon alignment，并添加 pg_search migration files。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- v0.2.14 は version detection で Git tags より environment variables を優先します。
- Completion URL host extraction は v1 と non-v1 endpoints の両方を処理するようになりました。
- parser chunk index logging が修正され、Ollama retest icon alignment が改善され、pg_search migration files が追加されました。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- v0.2.14는 version detection에서 Git tags보다 environment variables를 우선합니다.
- Completion URL host extraction은 이제 v1 및 non-v1 endpoints를 모두 처리합니다.
- parser chunk index logging이 수정되고 Ollama retest icon alignment가 개선되었으며 pg_search migration files가 추가되었습니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- v0.2.14 donne la priorite aux environment variables plutot qu'aux Git tags pour version detection.
- Completion URL host extraction gere maintenant les endpoints v1 et non-v1.
- Parser chunk index logging a ete corrige, Ollama retest icon alignment a ete ameliore et pg_search migration files ont ete ajoutes.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- v0.2.14 priorisiert environment variables gegenueber Git tags fuer version detection.
- Completion URL host extraction verarbeitet nun sowohl v1- als auch non-v1 endpoints.
- Parser chunk index logging wurde korrigiert, Ollama retest icon alignment verbessert und pg_search migration files wurden hinzugefuegt.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- v0.2.14 prioriterar miljövariabler framför Git-taggar för versionsdetektering.
- Kompletterande URL värdextraktion hanterar nu både v1 och non-v1 slutpunkter.
- Loggningen av Parser chunk index fixades, Ollama retest-ikonjusteringen förbättrades och pg_search-migreringsfiler lades till.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το v0.2.14 δίνει προτεραιότητα στις μεταβλητές περιβάλλοντος έναντι των ετικετών Git για τον εντοπισμό έκδοσης.
- Η εξαγωγή κεντρικού υπολογιστή ολοκλήρωσης URL χειρίζεται πλέον τα τελικά σημεία v1 και non-v1.
- Η καταγραφή ευρετηρίου τμημάτων ανάλυσης διορθώθηκε, βελτιώθηκε η στοίχιση εικονιδίων επανελέγχου του Ollama και προστέθηκαν αρχεία μετεγκατάστασης pg_search.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- v0.2.14 daje prioritet varijablama okoline u odnosu na Git oznake za otkrivanje verzije.
- Završetak URL ekstrakcija hosta sada obrađuje i v1 i non-v1 krajnje točke.
- Popravljeno je bilježenje indeksa parsera, poravnanje Ollama retest ikona je poboljšano i dodane su datoteke za migraciju pg_search.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- v0.2.14 prioriza variáveis ​​de ambiente em vez de tags Git para deteção de versão.
- A extração do host URL de conclusão trata agora dos endpoints v1 e non-v1.
- O registo do índice do bloco do analisador foi corrigido, o alinhamento do ícone de reteste do Ollama foi melhorado e foram adicionados ficheiros de migração pg_search.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- v0.2.14 отдает приоритет переменным среды над тегами Git для определения версии.
- Завершенное извлечение хоста URL теперь обрабатывает конечные точки v1 и non-v1.
- Исправлено ведение журнала индекса фрагментов парсера, улучшено выравнивание значков повторного тестирования Ollama и добавлены файлы миграции pg_search.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- v0.2.14 sürüm tespiti için ortam değişkenlerine Git etiketleri üzerinden öncelik verir.
- URL ana bilgisayar çıkarma işleminin tamamlanması artık hem v1 hem de non-v1 uç noktalarını işliyor.
- Ayrıştırıcı öbek dizini günlüğü düzeltildi, Ollama yeniden test simgesi hizalaması iyileştirildi ve pg_search geçiş dosyaları eklendi.
